variants.description: Drives zero output and therefore fails the stable waveform contract.
Inverts the first binary-search comparison, corrupting the MSB and later thresholds.
Uses a one-eighth first threshold update instead of the required one-quarter step.
Reverses the emitted bit order after conversion.
VA Lx ADC Ideal 4b: scales the metric output, preserving the main path while failing measurement checks.
